DESCRIPTION: Verify that clicking the checkbox marks a todo as completed and updates the footer count
NAME: User can complete a todo item

DESCRIPTION: Verify that hovering and clicking delete removes the todo item from the list
NAME: User can delete a todo item

DESCRIPTION: Verify that double clicking a todo allows editing and saves the updated text
NAME: User can edit an existing todo item

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a user can add a todo item and it appears in the list with correct count
NAME: User can add a single todo item

DESCRIPTION: Verify that Active filter shows incomplete todos and Completed filter shows done todos
NAME: User can filter todos by Active and Completed
